前女友和顶头上司勾搭在一起了？
赶紧跑，这年头做什么不能过活。随随便便开家店呗。
租金太贵，没钱开？
那就在郊区开一家租金便宜的。
郊区没人？
那就先从外卖做起。
绑定美食净化系统，过滤所有科技与狠活。
先让自己的食材无与伦比。
一道人人惊悚的西湖醋鱼逆转口碑，香味浓郁的酥鱼让人口水直流。
油焖笋闷出地道笋鲜，搭配南风肉的腌笃鲜更让鲜味达到顶峰……
退休科研人员、公司老总、有关部门重要人员……你们不睡觉排我店门口做什么？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8eaf4ba639f770c1fdc58b1657d2c4e7","author":"我不是佩奇妈妈","author_id":"","book_id":"7592100381308488766","book_name":"走投无路郊区开饭馆，火爆全网","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0d8b8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7592100482030502462","read_count":"30818","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"311803"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.4","serial_count":"152","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,美食","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/247862f134bf1b2beb2c9de4024ea1f6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382245&x-signature=oGayc9dq3xEKbqjIyzEjAdRb1do%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"84312154858","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"55"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230050456D542C88E5702454FC62"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":781,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6863,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2950},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614086276875944729","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"美食文的角度写的很好，但是剧情人际关系方面目前没看懂作者意图，可能就是想写生活的油盐酱醋和世事无常？

57221930337048","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"节奏挺舒服的，慢慢也有新菜式。那个志伟老哭多了看着累累的，有点不讨喜。后面可能招人，希望主体还是围绕主角来，现在更的有点少，不知道后面有没有CP。感觉以现在这种节奏写男主一步步以美食遇见很多人还挺好的，但是后面不知道是不是有打脸前女友的剧情（有的话希望少点吧）。少点奇葩事吧，男主现在做做美食挺好的。","text_exts":[{"e":117,"s":114,"text":"前女友","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%89%8D%E5%A5%B3%E5%8F%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741982452454FC62%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227602457221930337048%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227592100381308488766%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%89%8D%E5%A5%B3%E5%8F%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770087910,"group_id":"7592100381308488766","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"主角控，不看虐女，憋屈，男扮女装，弯掰直文。不爱群像，只关注主角，言情不掺腐。有问题直说，阴阳怪气的神人离我远一点","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0ozNfm0FQkiXzF+mF8Cdog=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f84e168a8546452bb216c686f8a65030~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794620&x-signature=BTTrjSv00Q2ICxyDX0BnjvywFQE%3D","user_id":"637343580291148","user_name":"爱阅读的小学生"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"637343580291148","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1707986143,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6
